description: UK digital health company formed by merging several healthtech companies. Offers GP services, mental health support, physiotherapy, and wellness tools to employers and insurers.
business_model: B2B - Sold to employers, insurers, and public sector
target_market: UK employers, private health insurers, NHS
competitive_advantage: Consolidated service offering, strong investor backing, UK market focus

varden_fit.rationale: UK market competitor - potential partner for occupational health component
